text.title: vr-design-patterns Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: novice-targeted VR adventure on Quest 3.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Adventure VR game targeting first-time users on Quest 3. Three scenes: lobby + outdoor + arena. All require comfort defaults.

section.title: Resulting artefact
Outcome
section.p: Validator exits 0. Comfort menu surfaces all toggles. Hardware test with 5 first-time users: no nausea reports.
